tests_written: 6 column-level + 1 combination uniqueness + 1 not-null on revpar_usd

root_cause.headline: Five Ardmore Grand Sunbelt properties share an OTA-direct rate-parity issue: OTA channel underpriced by 7-12% on Tue-Wed bookings
root_cause.detail: The new gold table surfaces that all five Sunbelt Grand properties had an avg_parity_gap_pct between -7% and -12% on Tuesday-Wednesday stay nights during week 2026-05-12, generating 5 parity-breach days. OTA-sourced bookings cannibalized direct-channel revenue on those nights, compressing RevPAR without reducing occupancy. Heritage city properties had zero breach days the same week. The fix is a channel-rate configuration change, not a yield-management overhaul.
root_cause.affected_cohort: 5 Ardmore Grand Sunbelt properties · Tue-Wed stay nights · week of 2026-05-12

without_wizard.label: Without dbt-wizard
without_wizard.summary: Question enters the analytics backlog. Revenue Committee meets without the answer.
narrative: CRO files the request. It enters the analytics backlog at priority B.
Data engineer scopes the work Monday morning — four days after the committee.
Engineer writes SQL from scratch, joining four silver and gold models by hand.
Tests, YAML, and contract get bolted on at PR time. Sometimes.
Revenue team cannot isolate root cause before the committee meeting.
$2.6M weekly revenue softness carries into the next booking week unfixed.

with_wizard.label: With dbt-wizard
with_wizard.summary: Four sub-agents surface the upstreams, author the SQL, write the tests, and materialize the asset in 90 seconds.
narrative: Explorer runs status and search. Returns the four silver and gold upstream candidates.
Summary runs describe and lineage. Confirms join path and names the new grain.
Worker runs dbt_show on a 4-week slice. Validates Sunbelt vs Heritage divergence.
Worker authors fct_revpar_attribution_by_brand_region_week.sql with CTEs and final SELECT.
Verification writes the YAML — description, schema contract, 8 tests, ownership.
Worker materializes the table to Iceberg. Verification confirms downstream lineage.
CRO presents root-cause finding to Revenue Committee 14 hours ahead of schedule.

hero.label: Root cause identified 14 hours before the Revenue Committee meets
hero.note: From CRO question to materialized Iceberg gold table — versioned, tested, documented, lineage-tracked. The revenue team now knows the OTA channel underpricing on Tue-Wed bookings drove the Sunbelt softness. The fix is a channel-rate configuration change, not a yield-management overhaul. $2.6M weekly revenue softness has a diagnosis and a clear remediation path.
